results.justification: MoGE groups experts during selection AND constrains tokens to activate EQUAL number within each predefined group — same pair-level routing concept; ANGKLUNG's pair-of-2 is the special case K=2.
MoHGE two-level routing across experts in groups; same architectural class as ANGKLUNG pair-level routing.

results.matched_effect_cluster: Permutation operator over FFN copies in MoE
results.justification: Upcycling MoE uses weight permutation over FFN before copying to experts — directly the fixed permutation operator concept.
Weight ensembling MoE shares weights across experts; same artefact (shared/tied weights across experts) different specifics.
Routing sharing cross-layer not in-pair; below threshold.
